title: Cotton String 6 Pack 60m Each (360m Total) White Butchers Twine for Meat, Cooking & Sausage Making, Strong Food Safe Kitchen String for Craft, DIY, Garden, Parcel & Household Use
features: Generous Bulk Pack: 6 white cotton twine rolls, each 60m (360m total). Ample supply of cooking string and craft string for everyday use, from tying roasts in the kitchen to wrapping gifts or gardening.

Premium Natural Cotton: Made from 100% food-safe, oven-safe cotton, this butcher’s twine is chemical-free, durable and won’t fray. Perfect as meat string for trussing roasts and tying homemade sausages.
Culinary Essential: Use this versatile cooking string to tie up roasts, poultry or herbs. Keeps meat perfectly shaped while roasting or grilling for even cooking and professional results.

Craft & DIY Versatility: Perfect for gift wrapping, knitting, scrapbooking and other crafts. Also great as garden twine to tie plants or flowers, or as a decorative string for hanging wall art and photos.

Eco-Friendly & Strong: 100% natural cotton that’s biodegradable and compostable. Despite its soft feel, this thick braided twine is surprisingly strong and supports heavy loads without stretching. A sustainable, reusable choice for home and garden.
description: Product Description premium 100 % natural cotton : Crafted from pure cotton fibers with no chemical dyes, ensuring a biodegradable and compostable cord for all your creative and culinary needs value pack of 6 rolls : Six individual balls, each 60 m (196 ft) long, providing a total of 360 m (1,176 ft) to satisfy large-scale projects or multiple kitchen uses multipurpose creative twine : Perfect for book binding, gift decorations, wrapping, candle wicks, and more—ideal for both home décor and professional crafting food-safe kitchen twine : Certified for culinary use—perfect for trussing turkeys and roasts, tying poultry, baking, and sausage making without imparting flavors durable & strong : Engineered to withstand tension for macramé, weaving, and sturdy wrapping applications, while remaining soft to the touch easy-pull center spool : Simply pull the string from the center of the ball and cut to your desired length—no tangles or messy spools soft & non-abrasive : Smooth cotton surface protects delicate materials and plants, making it perfect for floral arranging and garden support ideal for macramé & DIY crafts : Great for creating intricate wall hangings, bohemian wedding decorations, plant hangers, and other artisan projects gift wrapping & packaging : Elevate your packaging with a rustic, handmade look—tie gift boxes, mailers, and party favors with charming cotton twine home & office organization : Bundle cables, tag files, secure stationery, and craft custom labels—versatile twine for tidying up home offices and studios
